# PERF-172 negative: wg.Wait but write happens inside goroutine
lang: go
file: PERF-172-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
	"sync"
)

func NonBlockingHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	wg.Add(1)
	go func() {
		_, _ = io.Copy(w, strings.NewReader("done"))
		wg.Done()
	}()
	wg.Wait()
}
